narrative:
Hubbard Twp D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 975 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
